title: COVID-19, An Act respecting certain measures related to
title_en: COVID-19, An Act respecting certain measures related to
short_name: COVID-19, An Act respecting certain m...
description: An Act respecting certain measures related to COVID-19 (COVID-19, An Act respecting certain m...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Payments out of C.R.F.
provisions.content: 1 The Minister of Health may make payments, the total of which may not exceed $2.5 billion, out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund for any expenses incurred on or after January 1, 2022 in relation to coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) tests.

provisions.title: Transfers
provisions.content: 2 The Minister of Health may transfer to any province or territory, or to any body or person in Canada, any coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) tests or instruments used in relation to those tests acquired by Her Majesty in right of Canada on or after April 1, 2021.
